name: Becton, Dickinson and Co.
h1: BD, Becton Dickinson's GCC footprint in India
lede: BD, Becton Dickinson runs five capability centers across five Indian cities. Vellore, Gurugram, Rewari, Bengaluru and Chandigarh, covering CoE, gbs, it, manufacturing and R&D, built over 31 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one BD, Becton Dickinson office in India. We map five, across five cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: BD, Becton Dickinson GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: BD, Becton Dickinson runs 5 verified GCC centers across 5 Indian cities (Vellore, Gurugram, Rewari, Bengaluru, Chandigarh), covering CoE, gbs, it, manufacturing and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: Head - Science & Technology and Adviser - Biz Development

about.description: BD, Becton Dickinson's India footprint covers Vellore, Gurugram, Rewari, Bengaluru and Chandigarh, spanning CoE, gbs, it, manufacturing and R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Surgical Devices, Medical Devices and Equipment
about.headquarters: Franklin Lakes, New Jersey, United States

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all nineteen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does BD, Becton Dickinson operate in India?
faq.a: BD, Becton Dickinson operates 5 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does BD, Becton Dickinson have GCC centers in?
faq.a: BD, Becton Dickinson's India GCC footprint spans Vellore, Gurugram, Rewari, Bengaluru and Chandigarh.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does BD, Becton Dickinson run in India?
faq.a: BD, Becton Dickinson runs CoE, gbs, it, manufacturing and R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at BD, Becton Dickinson's India GCCs?
faq.a: BD, Becton Dickinson's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads BD, Becton Dickinson's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 19 leaders at BD, Becton Dickinson's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
